Chart Your Course. Own the Sky.

Vervve Academy trains the next generation of aviation professionals — from first flight to airline-ready.

Explore Programs
Image Placeholder

WHAT WE OFFER

Programs Built For Every Stage

Industry-aligned courses designed with airline partners — so you graduate ready to work, not just certified.

01
Diploma in Airport Management 1 Year

Get access to one of the top aviation management courses in Bangalore. Learn airport operations, management principles, and industry best practices.

→
02
Diploma in Cabin Crew & Airport Ground Operations 1 Year

Kick-start your career in the cabin crew! Comprehensive training in safety, service, and ground operations for the aviation industry.

→
03
Certification Course in Airline Customer Service 6 Months

Get exposure to frontline airline customer service techniques and flight attendant skills. Perfect for aspiring airline professionals.

→
04
Corporate Training Custom

Professional development programs for airline and aviation industry staff. Tailored training solutions for corporate clients.

→
2,000+
Students Trained
95%
Placement Rate
50+
Airline Partners
15+
Years

“We don’t just teach aviation.
We build careers.”

WHY VERVE

Training That Goes Beyond
the Classroom

STUDENT STORIES

From Our Graduates

Hear from the people
who've been there.

Vervve didn't just give me a license — they gave me a career. The faculty treated us like professionals from day one.

Aryan Mehta

CPL · Batch 2023

The placement support was incredible. I had my first airline interview within 3 months of completing my CPL.

Priya Sinha

CPL · Batch 2023

Best decision I ever made. The simulator hours alone are worth it — you feel like a real pilot before you even solo.

Rahul Nair

PPL · Batch 2024

Vervve didn't just give me a license — they gave me a career. The faculty treated us like professionals from day one.

Aryan Mehta

CPL · Batch 2023

The placement support was incredible. I had my first airline interview within 3 months of completing my CPL.

Priya Sinha

CPL · Batch 2023

Best decision I ever made. The simulator hours alone are worth it — you feel like a real pilot before you even solo.

PPL · Batch 2024

FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

  • Candidates must be at least 17 years old with a minimum of 50% marks in Physics and Mathematics in their 12th standard. A valid Class 2 medical certificate is also required.

  • The complete CPL program takes approximately 12-18 months, depending on weather conditions and individual flight training progress.

  • The cost varies based on the program chosen. We offer flexible payment plans and scholarship options. Contact our admissions team for a detailed fee structure.

  • Yes, we have a dedicated placement cell with partnerships with 50+ airlines. Our placement rate stands at 95% within 6 months of course completion.

  • We partner with leading banks for education loans. Additionally, we offer scholarships for meritorious students and those from economically weaker sections.
